commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 19:6 And said to the judges, Take heed what you do: for you judge not for man, but for the LORD, who is with you in the judgment. And whatsoever. Hebrew, "who is with you in the judgment. "The Lord will confirm your just decisions, and punish your injustice. (Haydock) God stood in the synagogue of gods, or judges, Psalm lxxxi. Judges ought not so much to regard man as God, when they pass sentence. (Calmet) How then will the Anabaptists deny that a man may sit in judgment.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
